---
title: "Notes"
title-block: false
---

# Notes

::: {.lead style="font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 2.4rem; max-width: 65ch;"}
Short writings on research, methods, teaching, and things along the way.
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Coming soon.** Notes will appear here over time. Until then, you can follow along on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/pietrostefani.bsky.social) or get in touch by [email](mailto:e.pietrostefani@liverpool.ac.uk).
:::
